subcategory: SaaS dashboard hero with app preview
use_cases: Landing page entry point for SaaS products showcasing dashboard features
Product overview section with mock app preview to demonstrate capabilities
Marketing hero section with dual CTAs for sign-up and learn-more flows
Landing pages for dev tools and project management applications
Software product showcases with data table and filter previews
ai_summary: A modern hero section component featuring a navigation bar with logo, nav links, and auth options, combined with hero content containing headline, description, and dual CTAs. Includes an interactive app preview mockup section with data table, filters, and action buttons to showcase SaaS product capabilities. Designed for SaaS landing pages with a clean, minimalist aesthetic suitable for dev tools and creator platforms.
